tagline: AI-powered risk assessment for ovarian cysts
description: Upload an ultrasound image and our AI will compute the O‑RADS score (1-5) and provide clinical features, risk assessment, and a conversational assistant. Your data stays private - no cloud storage.
video3_title: When is a cyst a problem?
upload_area_text:
Drag & drop an ultrasound image here
or click to browse
qr_code_label: Scan QR code to view this analysis on your phone
